room_description: Un bosque interminable. Arboles se extienden hasta donde alcanza la vista. El terreno ondula suavemente entre colinas cubiertas de hierba.

terrain.ground_texture_prompt: forest floor, wild grass, dirt, fallen leaves, natural, seamless tiling

grass.texture_prompt: wild grass blades on transparent background, dark green, alpha cutout

trees.trunk_texture_prompt: dark tree bark, rough, mossy, seamless tiling
trees.foliage_texture_prompt: dark green tree canopy foliage on transparent background, dense leaves, alpha cutout
